description: Implement a custom Java annotation-based validation framework using Reflection within the 'chinook-validator' Maven project. Create the @NotNull, @StringLength, @Range, and @Pattern annotation interfaces with Runtime retention in the 'com.chinook.validation' package. Implement a generic 'Validator.validate(Object obj)' method that uses Reflection to inspect these annotations on any object and returns a list of ValidationErrors. Ensure the implementation passes all 14 tests in 'ValidatorTest'.
